projects.title: Automated Water Filtering system
projects.description: A hardware-software solution for clean water processing using Arduino and sensors.
projects.details: This project features a real-time monitoring system that controls filtration based on water quality sensors. The dashboard displays turbidity and pH levels, ensuring safe output.

projects.title: Real-time Collaborative Whiteboard
projects.description: An interactive whiteboard application allowing multiple users to draw together in real-time.
projects.details: Built with Next.js and TypeScript, this application uses WebSockets to enable low-latency communication. Users can draw, write, and add shapes simultaneously.

projects.title: Home Automation System with Raspberry Pi
projects.description: A custom system to control lights and appliances remotely using a Raspberry Pi.
projects.details: This IoT project combines hardware and software to create a smart home hub. A Flask server on a Raspberry Pi controls various relays for lights and monitoring.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform for Local Artisans
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce site to help local artists sell their creations online.
projects.details: Provides a platform for local artists to showcase work. Built on Vue.js with Firebase for storage and Stripe for secure payments.

projects.title: Mobile App for Language Learning
projects.description: A gamified mobile app that makes learning a new language fun and interactive.
projects.details: A gamified mobile app developed with React Native. It features interactive quizzes, flashcards, and progress-tracking challenges.

projects.title: Data Visualization of Climate Change
projects.description: An interactive dashboard that visualizes global climate data trends.
projects.details: Built with D3.js to visualize complex climate data. Animated charts and maps illustrate temperature trends and CO2 levels over decades.
